01 — About

Who I Am

I'm a Computer Science and Engineering student with a strong focus on Machine Learning, Data Science, and Cybersecurity. I love building AI-powered applications that solve real-world problems.

My journey spans from developing a Ransomware Detection Engine at IIITDM Kancheepuram to building full-stack AI web applications with Python and Flask. I thrive at the intersection of security and intelligent systems.

I'm constantly learning — whether it's fine-tuning neural networks with TensorFlow, exploring feature engineering techniques, or experimenting with new web technologies.

03 — Projects

Featured Work

PROJECT 01 — IIITDM

Ransomware Detection Engine

A machine learning-based engine developed at IIITDM Kancheepuram to detect and classify ransomware threats. Uses behavioral analysis and feature engineering to identify malicious patterns before execution.

PythonScikit-learnCybersecurityML
PROJECT 02

Web-Based AI Assistant

A full-stack AI assistant application built with Flask and JavaScript. Integrates with language model APIs to provide intelligent conversational experiences through a clean web interface.

FlaskJavaScriptHTML/CSSAI APIs
PROJECT 03

Create Your First Web App with Python

An educational project and tutorial guide demonstrating how to build complete web applications using Python and Flask from scratch, covering routing, templates, and database integration.

PythonFlaskSQLHTML
PROJECT 04

Potato Disease Classifier

A deep learning-powered image classification system that identifies potato plant diseases from leaf images. Trained using TensorFlow with data augmentation and achieves high accuracy on disease detection.

TensorFlowDeep LearningImage ClassificationPython
PROJECT 05

Face Recognition System

A computer vision system for real-time face detection and recognition. Uses feature extraction and machine learning pipelines to identify individuals accurately under varying lighting conditions.

PythonComputer VisionMLScikit-learn
